findings.description: Service account 'default/default' does not explicitly disable automount of service account tokens.
findings.title: Default service account may auto-mount tokens

findings.description: Service account 'default/fox-admin' is bound to high-impact roles (cluster-admin).
findings.title: Service account has elevated Kubernetes role

findings.description: Service account 'storefront/web' is bound to high-impact roles (edit).
findings.title: Service account has elevated Kubernetes role

service_accounts.name: fox-admin
service_accounts.token_posture: token auto-mount is visible on 1 attached workload; legacy token secret is visible
service_accounts.why_care: Identity path stands out because it has cluster-wide admin-like access, touches 1 risky workload context, is used by 1 visible workload, has a visible token path.

service_accounts.name: web
service_accounts.why_care: Identity path stands out because it can change workloads, fronts 1 exposed workload, is used by 1 visible workload.

service_accounts.name: default
service_accounts.token_posture: service account allows token auto-mount; legacy token secret is visible
service_accounts.why_care: Identity path stands out because it has a visible token path.
